meaning: n.(鍐呯噧鏈虹殑)鎻愬墠鐐圭伀,鑷姩鐐圭伀,棰勭噧
examples: A few sentences regarding preignition and detonation may be helpful.
This paper introduces a new power supply of preignition for pulse xenon lamp.
The higher the octane number, the greater the resistance to preignition making a higher compression ratio possible.
This means that the compression ratio of an ICE using ethanol can be taken up to 24:1 compression ratio before preignition begins to happen.
